name: unknown_amenity
description: Tenant asks for the terrace, but only Game Room exists. Even when the LLM mistakenly marks handoff_ready=true and emits location_slug='terrace', the amenity resolver (Piece 4) refuses silent substitution: locationId stays empty, no brain call fires, no reservation is created. Regression for 'terrace → game room substitution'.

turns.userMessage: i want to book the terrace tomorrow 3-5 pm

llm.reply: Your building doesn't have a Terrace amenity set up. We have: Game Room. Want to book that instead?
